'''hangozo''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:nobodyness|nobodyness]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''female''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| h-ng-z
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:nobodyness|nobodyness]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| female
|-
! Citation form
| hangozo
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:hængezeth|hængezeth]] || [[word:hængezej|hængezej]] || [[word:hængezesh|hængezesh]] || [[word:hængeze|hængeze]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:hangongozoth|hangongozoth]] || [[word:hangongozoj|hangongozoj]] || [[word:hangongozosh|hangongozosh]] || [[word:hangongozo|hangongozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:hangozoth|hangozoth]] || [[word:hangozoj|hangozoj]] || [[word:hangozosh|hangozosh]] || [[word:hangozo|hangozo]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:hangofzoth|hangofzoth]] || [[word:hangofzoj|hangofzoj]] || [[word:hangofzosh|hangofzosh]] || [[word:hangofzof|hangofzof]]
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for female singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || [[word:hangozotho|hangozotho]] || [[word:hangozojo|hangozojo]] || [[word:hangozosho|hangozosho]] || [[word:hangozoko|hangozoko]]
|-
| [[Patient]] || [[word:hangozoth|hangozoth]] || [[word:hangozoj|hangozoj]] || [[word:hangozosh|hangozosh]] || [[word:hangozo|hangozo]]
|-
| [[Possessive]] || [[word:hangozothol|hangozothol]] || [[word:hangozojol|hangozojol]] || [[word:hangozoshol|hangozoshol]] || [[word:hangozokol|hangozokol]]
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || [[word:hangozothotho|hangozothotho]] || [[word:hangozojojo|hangozojojo]] || [[word:hangozoshosho|hangozoshosho]] || [[word:hangozoko|hangozoko]]
|-
| [[Dative]] || [[word:hangozothon|hangozothon]] || [[word:hangozojon|hangozojon]] || [[word:hangozoshon|hangozoshon]] || [[word:hangozokon|hangozokon]]
|-
| [[Speaker]] || [[word:hangozothoro|hangozothoro]] || [[word:hangozojoro|hangozojoro]] || [[word:hangozoshoro|hangozoshoro]] || [[word:hangozokoro|hangozokoro]]
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki female nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|d03cc2d}}
